# Let's load the provided JSON files and explore their structure.
import json, re, unicodedata, math, os, sys, itertools

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

def read_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = read_json(quran_path)
len(quran), type(quran)

import re, unicodedata

ARABIC_DIACRITICS_PATTERN = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')  # tanween, tashkeel, small marks
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return None
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # remove diacritics (tashkeel, small high signs)
    s = ARABIC_DIACRITICS_PATTERN.sub('', s)
    # normalize various alifs
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # normalize hamza-on-carriers
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # normalize alef maqsura to ya
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation, quotes
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', s)  # keep Arabic letters/numbers/spaces
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

full_span = "وَإِنْ يَمْسَسْكَ اللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ فَلا كَاشِفَ لَهُ إِلاَّ هُوَ وَإِنْ يُرِدْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَلا رَادَّ لِفَضْلِهِ"
snippet = "وَإِنْ يَم...لِفَضْلِهِ"

norm_full_span = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_arabic(snippet)
norm_full_span, norm_snippet

# Build normalized list of ayah texts
norm_ayahs = [normalize_arabic(a['ayah_text']) for a in quran]

# We'll search for norm_full_span as substring in these normalized ayah texts
indices_contains_full = [i for i, t in enumerate(norm_ayahs) if norm_full_span in t]
len(indices_contains_full), indices_contains_full[:10]

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming LCS length for typical lengths (we are fine: a ~ 100 chars, b ~ 250 max)
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                if dp[j] < dp[j-1]:
                    dp[j] = dp[j-1]
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

candidate = quran[i]['ayah_text']
norm_candidate = normalize_arabic(candidate)
norm_full = norm_full_span

lcs_len = lcs_length(norm_full, norm_candidate)
sim_to_full = lcs_len / max(len(norm_full), 1)
lcs_len, len(norm_full), len(norm_candidate), sim_to_full

content.text: {"correction":"وَإِنْ يَمْسَسْكَ اللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ فَلَا كَاشِفَ لَهُ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ وَإِنْ يُرِدْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَلَا رَادَّ لِفَضْلِهِ ۚ يُصِيبُ بِهِ مَنْ يَشَاءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ ۚ وَهُوَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ"}
